name: 張庭瑜
objective:
本課程主要目的在於讓學生透過熟悉財金時事所使用之英文專業名詞、市場術語，以及行業慣有之英文論述結構等提升財金領域之專業英文閱讀能力；此外，本課程亦將著重於訓練學生之英譯能力。
The major purpose of this course is to promote learners’ reading ability by training them to understand terminologies, jargons and description structure of writings in finance news and events. In addition, this course also aims to train the learners’ ability of translating English into Chinese.
schedule:
(a)Week 1(b)Course Introduction:Overview of course, grading, report format, and how to track reliable financial news
(a)Week 2(b)Tech & Finance Basics: Role of tech stocks in global markets; why they drive sentiment
(a)Week 3(b)Semiconductors & Supply Chains:Chip war, geopolitics, supply chain restructuring
(a)Week 4(b)AI & Market Impact:Generative AI boom, capital flows, productivity & risk
(a)Week 5(b)Tech IPOs :Startup listings (IPO, SPAC), valuation, fundraising trends
(a)Week 6(b)Big Tech Earnings:Apple, Meta, Amazon, NVIDIA earnings and market reactions
(a)Week 7(b)Digital Finance & FinTech:Virtual banks, payment innovations, digital transformation in finance
(a)Week 8(b)Blockchain & Crypto:Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, regulatory environment
(a)Week 9(b)ESG & Green Tech:EVs, renewable energy, carbon markets and sustainability
(a)Week 10(b)Tech & Consumer Markets:E-commerce, platform economy, advertising ecosystems
(a)Week 11(b)Tech War & Geopolitics:US–China tech rivalry, export controls, policy risk
(a)Week 12(b)Tech Investment Trends:Cross-border deals, M&A, venture capital in tech
scorePolicy:
1. Participation & Discussion: 20%
Attendance and active participation in class
Contribution to group discussions and Q&A
Engagement during peer presentations
2. Weekly News Analysis (In-class Presentation): 40%
Group presentation of one selected news article each week (~10 minutes)
Evaluation criteria: completeness of summary, data & background analysis, discussion of impacts, clarity of delivery
Grading is group-based, but individual contribution will also be observed
3. Personal Report: 40%
Each student submits a 1–2 page written report every week
Required sections: news source, summary, background, supporting data, impact analysis, personal opinion
Evaluation criteria: completeness (40%), depth of analysis (30%), originality of insights (20%), formatting & punctuality (10%)
materials:
1.Essential (Free & Easy Access)
Reuters – global markets, politics, and business (fast, concise, reliable)
Bloomberg (free articles) – daily market, economy, and tech coverage
Yahoo Finance – stock data with aggregated financial news
Financial Times (FT) – free limited articles, strong global finance focus
2.Recommended (with subscription / library access)
The Wall Street Journal (WSJ) – U.S. & international business/markets
The Economist – background, policy, and global trends
CNBC – real-time U.S. market and corporate news
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG4：優質教育（Quality Education）SDG8：尊嚴就業與經濟發展（Decent Work and Economic Growth）SDG9：產業創新與基礎設施（Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure）SDG12：負責任的消費與生產（Responsible Consumption and Production）SDG17：夥伴關係（Partnerships for the Goals）
課程是否導入AI: ● 簡單介紹 AI 的基本概念（Briefly introduce the basic concept of AI）● 深入探討 AI 的原理與應用（Explore the principles and applications of AI in depth）

name: 楊神珠
objective:
本課程主要目的在於讓學生透過熟悉財金時事所使用之英文專業名詞、市場術語，以及行業慣有之英文論述結構等提升財金領域之專業英文閱讀能力；此外，本課程亦將著重於訓練學生之英譯能力。
This course explores the intersection of technology and financial markets, from semiconductors, AI, and digital finance to blockchain and ESG. Students will learn how to source credible information, analyze industry trends, assess market impacts, and present their insights.
schedule:
Learning Goals
•	Understand how technology and finance are connected
•	Analyze up-to-date tech-finance news
•	Use financial ratios, market data, and industry analysis tools
•	Develop informed investment, policy, or business perspectives
•	Build a habit of tracking and interpreting market developments


1	Technology & Finance	Tech stocks in global markets, sector movements
2	Semiconductors & Supply Chains	Chip war, supply chain restructuring
3	AI & Market Impact	Generative AI trends, capital flows
4	Tech IPOs	IPO & SPAC models, valuation basics
5	Big Tech Earnings	Apple, Meta, Amazon, NVIDIA case studies
6	Digital Finance & FinTech	Virtual banks, payment innovation
7	Blockchain & Crypto	BTC, ETH, CBDCs, regulations
8	ESG & Green Tech	EVs, renewable energy, carbon trading
9	Tech & Consumer Markets	E-commerce, platform economy
10	Tech War & Geopolitics: US-China rivalry, export controls
11	Tech Investment Trends: Cross-border deals, M&A
12	Final Project	Student presentations on chosen topics
13.   Top-BOSS Simulation on Financial Performance: 3 Important Financial Reports
14.  Top-BOSS Simulation on Management Strategy: 5 Key Steps
15.  Top-BOSS Simulation on Risking and Long-term Growth
16.  Article Reading: India’s conundrum (Financial Times)
17.   Article Reading:U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) (Financial Times)
18. Final Presentation
scorePolicy:
Teacher A:
Assessment
•	Participation & Discussion: 20%
•	Weekly News Analysis: 40%
•	Final Project: 40%
Class Flow (Each Week)
1.	News Briefing – 2–3 key events of the week
2.	Data Review – Stock prices, earnings, industry data
3.	Case Discussion – Group perspectives and debates
4.	Student Insights – Selected group presentations
5.	Wrap-up – Key takeaways & next week’s watchlist

Teacher B
Class Quiz      25% ( Group Presentation, individual report )
Final Term      25% 	( Paper Exam + Group Presentation )
Participation   50%    (20% Group work + 30 % Q+A )
materials:
Corporate Finance, 6th edition
Published by Pearson (July 24, 2023) © 2024
Jonathan Berk Stanford UniversityPeter DeMarzo Stanford University

Tools You’ll Learn
•	Valuation: P/E, P/B, EV/EBITDA
•	Growth Analysis: YoY & QoQ trends
•	Industry Analysis: SWOT, Porter’s Five Forces
•	Market Tracking: Sector rotation, scenario analysis
•	Data Sources: Bloomberg, Reuters, TradingView, Yahoo Finance
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG3：良好健康和福祉（Good Health and Well-being）SDG11：永續城市與社區（Sustainable Cities and Communities）SDG12：負責任的消費與生產（Responsible Consumption and Production）
課程是否導入AI: ● 使用生成式 AI 作為教學過程的輔助工具（Use generative AI tools as an aid to the teaching process）● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）● 使用生成式 AI 進行課堂即時互動（Use generative AI for real-time classroom interaction）
remarks: Tools You’ll Learn•	Valuation: P/E, P/B, EV/EBITDA•	Growth Analysis: YoY & QoQ trends•	Industry Analysis: SWOT, Porter’s Five Forces•	Market Tracking: Sector rotation, scenario analysis•	Data Sources: Bloomberg, Reuters, TradingView, Yahoo Finance
